stemHtml: You are flying an aircraft with fly-by-wire operating in normal law. You must perform a terrain escape manoeuvre to avoid a mountain. How should this be performed?

options.a: Gently pull back on the sidestick with caution so as to not stall.
options.b: Pull back on the sidestick to decelerate below V<sub>FE</sub>, then reduce the back pressure and extend flaps.
options.c: Firmly pull back on the sidestick but be careful to not exceed the limit load factor.
options.d: Firmly pull back on the sidestick with no hesitation.
